channel.title: Shrish Pickles, Podi & Sweets
channel.description: Handcrafted Andhra-style pickles, podi and sweets made in Richmond, VA. Ships within the USA.

item.g:title: Brinjal Amla Pickle — 250g
item.g:description: Unique brinjal and amla pickle with tangy, spicy, and earthy flavors. Good rare variety for customers who want something different.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Brinjal Amla Pickle — 500g
item.g:description: Unique brinjal and amla pickle with tangy, spicy, and earthy flavors. Good rare variety for customers who want something different.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Carrot Pickle — 250g
item.g:description: Andhra-style carrot pickle made with firm carrot pieces, chilli, mustard, fenugreek, turmeric, salt, and oil. Slightly sweet, spicy, and kid-friendly compared with very hot avakai.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Carrot Pickle — 500g
item.g:description: Andhra-style carrot pickle made with firm carrot pieces, chilli, mustard, fenugreek, turmeric, salt, and oil. Slightly sweet, spicy, and kid-friendly compared with very hot avakai.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Cauliflower Pickle — 250g
item.g:description: Andhra-style cauliflower pickle with crunchy cauliflower florets coated in red chilli, mustard, fenugreek, turmeric, salt, and oil. Tangy, spicy, and great as a rice or tiffin side.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Cauliflower Pickle — 500g
item.g:description: Andhra-style cauliflower pickle with crunchy cauliflower florets coated in red chilli, mustard, fenugreek, turmeric, salt, and oil. Tangy, spicy, and great as a rice or tiffin side.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Chintakaya Pachadi / Tamarind Pickle — 250g
item.g:description: Traditional tamarind-style pickle with sharp tangy flavor and South Indian spice. Excellent with rice, dal, curd rice, and breakfast items.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Chintakaya Pachadi / Tamarind Pickle — 500g
item.g:description: Traditional tamarind-style pickle with sharp tangy flavor and South Indian spice. Excellent with rice, dal, curd rice, and breakfast items.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Drumstick Pickle — 250g
item.g:description: Traditional drumstick pickle with spicy, tangy flavor. A good South Indian side for rice and dal.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Drumstick Pickle — 500g
item.g:description: Traditional drumstick pickle with spicy, tangy flavor. A good South Indian side for rice and dal.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Garlic Pickle — 250g
item.g:description: Bold garlic pickle with strong spice and deep flavor. Best for customers who love a punchy pickle with rice, dosa, or chapati.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Garlic Pickle — 500g
item.g:description: Bold garlic pickle with strong spice and deep flavor. Best for customers who love a punchy pickle with rice, dosa, or chapati.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Gongura Pickle/Pachadi — 250g
item.g:description: Tangy gongura pickle with bold South Indian spice. A Telugu favorite that pairs beautifully with hot rice and ghee.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Gongura Pickle/Pachadi — 500g
item.g:description: Tangy gongura pickle with bold South Indian spice. A Telugu favorite that pairs beautifully with hot rice and ghee.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Karivepaku / Curry Leaf Pachadi — 250g
item.g:description: Aromatic curry leaf pickle with earthy South Indian flavor and medium spice. Good with rice, idli, dosa, and curd rice.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Karivepaku / Curry Leaf Pachadi — 500g
item.g:description: Aromatic curry leaf pickle with earthy South Indian flavor and medium spice. Good with rice, idli, dosa, and curd rice.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Kothimeera Pachadi / Coriander Pickle — 250g
item.g:description: Fresh coriander-style pickle with a herby, spicy, and tangy taste. A good everyday pickle for rice, dosa, idli, and chapati.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Kothimeera Pachadi / Coriander Pickle — 500g
item.g:description: Fresh coriander-style pickle with a herby, spicy, and tangy taste. A good everyday pickle for rice, dosa, idli, and chapati.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Mango Avakai Pickle — 250g
item.g:description: Traditional Andhra-style raw mango avakai with mustard, red chilli, spices, and oil. Spicy, tangy, and perfect with hot rice, curd rice, dosa, idli, and chapati.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Mango Avakai Pickle — 500g
item.g:description: Traditional Andhra-style raw mango avakai with mustard, red chilli, spices, and oil. Spicy, tangy, and perfect with hot rice, curd rice, dosa, idli, and chapati.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Mango Ginger Pickle / Pachadi — 250g
item.g:description: A rare and flavorful pickle made with mango ginger. Fresh, aromatic, mildly tangy, and different from regular mango pickle.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Mango Ginger Pickle / Pachadi — 500g
item.g:description: A rare and flavorful pickle made with mango ginger. Fresh, aromatic, mildly tangy, and different from regular mango pickle.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Mango Thokku / Magai Pickle — 250g
item.g:description: Classic grated mango-style pickle with a rich spicy and tangy flavor. A strong everyday side for rice, dosa, idli, and curd rice.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Mango Thokku / Magai Pickle — 500g
item.g:description: Classic grated mango-style pickle with a rich spicy and tangy flavor. A strong everyday side for rice, dosa, idli, and curd rice.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Mixed Vegetable Pickle — 250g
item.g:description: Andhra-style mixed vegetable pickle with carrot, cauliflower, green chilli, and seasonal vegetables in a bold chilli-mustard spice mix. A colorful, crunchy side for rice and tiffins.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Mixed Vegetable Pickle — 500g
item.g:description: Andhra-style mixed vegetable pickle with carrot, cauliflower, green chilli, and seasonal vegetables in a bold chilli-mustard spice mix. A colorful, crunchy side for rice and tiffins.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Pandu Mirchi Pickle — 250g
item.g:description: Spicy red chilli pickle for customers who love serious heat. Strong, flavorful, and best with hot rice, dosa, idli, and curd rice.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Pandu Mirchi Pickle — 500g
item.g:description: Spicy red chilli pickle for customers who love serious heat. Strong, flavorful, and best with hot rice, dosa, idli, and curd rice.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Tomato Pickle — 250g
item.g:description: Rich and spicy tomato pickle with a deep, tangy flavor. Great with rice, dosa, upma, idli, chapati, and curd rice.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Tomato Pickle — 500g
item.g:description: Rich and spicy tomato pickle with a deep, tangy flavor. Great with rice, dosa, upma, idli, chapati, and curd rice.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Dhaniyalu Podi / Coriander Spice Powder — 100g
item.g:description: Andhra-style dhaniyalu podi made with roasted coriander seeds, chillies, cumin, and traditional spices. Aromatic, earthy, and perfect for mixing with hot rice and ghee or sprinkling on tiffins.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Dhaniyalu Podi / Coriander Spice Powder — 200g
item.g:description: Andhra-style dhaniyalu podi made with roasted coriander seeds, chillies, cumin, and traditional spices. Aromatic, earthy, and perfect for mixing with hot rice and ghee or sprinkling on tiffins.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Moringa Powder / Munagaku Podi — 100g
item.g:description: Andhra-style moringa powder made with roasted munagaku leaves, dals, chillies, garlic, and spices. Nutty, earthy, and a wholesome option with hot rice, ghee, idli, and dosa.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Moringa Powder / Munagaku Podi — 200g
item.g:description: Andhra-style moringa powder made with roasted munagaku leaves, dals, chillies, garlic, and spices. Nutty, earthy, and a wholesome option with hot rice, ghee, idli, and dosa.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Idli Podi — 100g
item.g:description: Classic South Indian idli karam podi. Mix with ghee or oil and serve with idli, dosa, uttapam, or hot rice.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Idli Podi — 200g
item.g:description: Classic South Indian idli karam podi. Mix with ghee or oil and serve with idli, dosa, uttapam, or hot rice.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Kandi Podi — 100g
item.g:description: Traditional dal-based kandi podi with rich South Indian flavor. Best mixed with hot rice and ghee or served with breakfast items.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Kandi Podi — 200g
item.g:description: Traditional dal-based kandi podi with rich South Indian flavor. Best mixed with hot rice and ghee or served with breakfast items.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Karapu Podi with Garlic — 100g
item.g:description: Spicy garlic karam podi with bold flavor. Perfect with hot rice and ghee, idli, dosa, or as a spicy side for everyday meals.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Karapu Podi with Garlic — 200g
item.g:description: Spicy garlic karam podi with bold flavor. Perfect with hot rice and ghee, idli, dosa, or as a spicy side for everyday meals.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Karivepaku Podi / Curry Leaf Powder — 100g
item.g:description: Aromatic curry leaf podi with traditional South Indian spices. Mix with hot rice and ghee or enjoy with idli, dosa, and upma.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Karivepaku Podi / Curry Leaf Powder — 200g
item.g:description: Aromatic curry leaf podi with traditional South Indian spices. Mix with hot rice and ghee or enjoy with idli, dosa, and upma.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Karela Pickle / Kakarakaya Pickle — 250g
item.g:description: Andhra-style bitter gourd pickle made with crisp fried karela pieces in a tangy, spicy tamarind and chilli masala. The frying and spices balance the natural bitterness, leaving a bold, appetising pickle for rice and tiffins.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Karela Pickle / Kakarakaya Pickle — 500g
item.g:description: Andhra-style bitter gourd pickle made with crisp fried karela pieces in a tangy, spicy tamarind and chilli masala. The frying and spices balance the natural bitterness, leaving a bold, appetising pickle for rice and tiffins.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Flaxseed Podi / Avise Podi — 100g
item.g:description: A wholesome Andhra-style flaxseed podi made with roasted avise ginjalu, dals, chillies, and garlic. Nutty, earthy, and rich in fibre and omega-3 - a healthy option mixed with hot rice and ghee or sprinkled over idli and dosa.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Flaxseed Podi / Avise Podi — 200g
item.g:description: A wholesome Andhra-style flaxseed podi made with roasted avise ginjalu, dals, chillies, and garlic. Nutty, earthy, and rich in fibre and omega-3 - a healthy option mixed with hot rice and ghee or sprinkled over idli and dosa.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Kakarakaya Karam Podi / Bitter Gourd Podi — 100g
item.g:description: A specialty Andhra podi made from dried bitter gourd roasted with chillies, dals, and spices. Bold, earthy, and mildly bitter with a spicy kick - best mixed with hot rice and ghee for an appetising, wholesome meal.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Kakarakaya Karam Podi / Bitter Gourd Podi — 200g
item.g:description: A specialty Andhra podi made from dried bitter gourd roasted with chillies, dals, and spices. Bold, earthy, and mildly bitter with a spicy kick - best mixed with hot rice and ghee for an appetising, wholesome meal.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Sambar Powder / Sambar Karam — 100g
item.g:description: A fresh, aromatic South Indian sambar powder made from roasted coriander, dals, chillies, fenugreek, and curry leaves. Adds authentic depth and warmth to sambar, rasam, and vegetable curries.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces

item.g:title: Sambar Powder / Sambar Karam — 200g
item.g:description: A fresh, aromatic South Indian sambar powder made from roasted coriander, dals, chillies, fenugreek, and curry leaves. Adds authentic depth and warmth to sambar, rasam, and vegetable curries.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Condiments & Sauces
